# Large Reference Document

Generated deterministically for performance and correctness tests (RFC-034).

# Chapter 1: Layer Architecture and Design Principles

The omriss editor processes Markdown source text as an immutable canonical artifact. Each heading demarcates a section whose body is a contiguous byte range within the source. Operations on one section must not rewrite bytes belonging to any other section unless the operation is explicitly a structural transformation such as promote, demote, or move. The omriss editor processes Markdown source text as an immutable canonical artifact. Each heading demarcates a section whose body is a contiguous byte range within the source. Operations on one section must not rewrite bytes belonging to any other section unless the operation is explicitly a structural transformation such as promote, demote, or move.

Operations on one section must not rewrite bytes belonging to any other section unless the operation is explicitly a structural transformation such as promote, demote, or move.
